tasks.label: 🚀 Start All (Docker)
tasks.command: docker compose up
tasks.detail: Inicia o banco de dados PostgreSQL e o backend Django via Docker Compose

tasks.label: 🚀 Start All w/ Build (Docker)
tasks.command: docker compose up --build
tasks.detail: Reconstroi as imagens Docker e inicia os serviços (ideal após alterações no requirements.txt)

tasks.label: 🚀 Start All Detached (Docker)
tasks.command: docker compose up -d
tasks.detail: Inicia todos os serviços em background (detached)

tasks.label: 🛑 Stop All (Docker)
tasks.command: docker compose down
tasks.detail: Para e remove todos os containers Docker

tasks.label: 🗑️ Stop All + Remove Volumes (Docker)
tasks.command: docker compose down -v
tasks.detail: ⚠️ Para os containers e apaga os volumes (dados do banco)

tasks.label: 🐘 Start DB Only
tasks.command: docker compose up db
tasks.detail: Inicia apenas o container do PostgreSQL

tasks.label: 🔧 Start Backend Only
tasks.command: docker compose up backend
tasks.detail: Inicia apenas o container do backend Django (requer DB rodando)

tasks.label: ⚡ Start Frontend (Next.js)
tasks.command: npm run dev
tasks.detail: Inicia o servidor de desenvolvimento Next.js em localhost:3000

tasks.label: 🧪 Run Unit Tests with Coverage
tasks.command: docker compose exec backend pytest tests/unit/ --cov=modules --cov-report=term-missing
tasks.detail: Executa os testes unitários com relatório de cobertura de código

tasks.label: 🔍 Ruff Lint
tasks.command: docker compose exec backend ruff check .
tasks.detail: Executa o linter Ruff no código backend

tasks.label: 🔍 Ruff Format Check
tasks.command: docker compose exec backend ruff format --check .
tasks.detail: Verifica a formatação do código sem modificá-lo

tasks.label: ✨ Ruff Format (Fix)
tasks.command: docker compose exec backend ruff format .
tasks.detail: Formata automaticamente o código backend com Ruff

tasks.label: 📦 Django Migrate
tasks.command: docker compose exec backend python manage.py migrate
tasks.detail: Executa as migrações pendentes do Django

tasks.label: 📦 Django Make Migrations
tasks.command: docker compose exec backend python manage.py makemigrations
tasks.detail: Cria novas migrações com base nas alterações dos models

tasks.label: 👤 Django Create Superuser
tasks.command: docker compose exec -it backend python manage.py createsuperuser
tasks.detail: Cria um superusuário para o painel admin do Django

tasks.label: 📋 Docker Logs (Backend)
tasks.command: docker compose logs -f backend
tasks.detail: Exibe os logs em tempo real do container backend

tasks.label: 🧪 Run Unit Tests (pytest)
tasks.command: docker compose exec backend pytest tests/unit/
tasks.detail: Executa os testes unitários utilizando a ferramenta Pytest

tasks.label: 🧪 Run Unit Tests (unittest)
tasks.command: docker compose exec backend python manage.py test tests.unit.test_unittest_example
tasks.detail: Executa os testes unitários utilizando a ferramenta nativa Unittest (cumpre requisito de 2 ferramentas)

tasks.label: 👾 Run Mutation Tests (mutmut)
tasks.command: docker compose exec backend mutmut run
tasks.detail: Executa o mutmut para aplicar Teste de Mutantes (exigência do slide)

tasks.label: 🔥 Run Performance Test (Locust)
tasks.command: docker compose exec backend python tests/system/performance/run_load_test.py --type ${input:testType}
tasks.detail: Executa teste de desempenho com Locust dentro do Docker (escolha o tipo)

tasks.label: 🚀 Run Performance Test (k6)
tasks.command: docker run --rm -i --net host -e BASE_URL=http://localhost:8000 grafana/k6 run - < backend/tests/system/performance/k6_script.js
tasks.detail: Executa teste de desempenho alternativo utilizando k6 via Docker

inputs.description: Qual tipo de teste de desempenho executar?
